tools.name: lucky_execute
tools.description: Compile and execute a Lucky (.lk) program via the Lucky Tool Protocol. Returns the execution result including outputs, cost, and duration. Supports both synchronous and asynchronous execution modes.

program.description: Path to a Lucky source file (.lk).

goal.description: Optional goal name to pursue. If omitted, the default goal is used.

context.description: Optional execution context as a JSON object with key-value pairs passed to the program.

mode.description: Execution mode. 'sync' waits for completion and returns the full result. 'async' returns an execution_id immediately for later polling. Default: 'sync'.

tools.name: lucky_status
tools.description: Get the current status of a Lucky execution. Returns the state (pending, running, completed, failed, cancelled) and result data if completed.

execution_id.description: The execution ID returned by lucky_execute when using mode='async'.

tools.name: lucky_approve
tools.description: Respond to a human-approval request from a Lucky program. Use this when a Lucky program pauses and requests a decision.

approval_id.description: The ID of the pending approval request.
